title: How to get started
subtitle: Your journey to becoming a global educator is simple and transparent.
ctaNote: Sign in now to start your tutor application.
footer: Privacy Policy   Terms of Service   Help Center   Contact Us   Twitter   LinkedIn

1.title: Sign up
1.description: Create your profile, upload your credentials, and tell us about your expertise.

2.title: Get approved
2.description: Our team reviews your profile to ensure quality and platform fit.

3.title: Start earning
3.description: Accept lesson requests and start sharing your knowledge with students.

1.title: Set your own rate
1.description: Choose your hourly rate and change it anytime. You are in full control of your business and earnings.

2.title: Teach anytime, anywhere
2.description: Decide when and how many hours you want to teach. No minimum hours, no fixed schedule. Work from home or on the go.

3.title: Grow professionally
3.description: Access exclusive webinars, professional development resources, and a supportive community of world-class educators.
